content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Market is flat intraday but individual sectors (power, pharma, FMCG, capital goods, PSU banks) are showing strong rotation with several names at or near 52-week highs on Q4 earnings catalysts. Book is already 79% deployed with only INR 14k remaining deployable, so the primary job this tick is position management — setting stop-losses on all 10 CNC holdings (which currently have zero SLs — a major risk gap) and trailing SLs on winners.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24130,
      "nifty_resistance": 24310
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 74.50,
      "new_target": 88.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Q4 beat (+35% PAT YoY, NNPA 0.13%) thesis intact. Stock at INR 78.90, above SMA20/50. Setting SL at 74.50 (~5.6% below entry, below recent swing low of 72.31 on 4/20 gap). Target 88 (~8% upside, above 52w high of 77 breakout). R:R ~1:2."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 955.00,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Record FY26 earnings, GNPA below 1% first time, +11% today with volume. Up 2.7% from entry. SL at 955 (near breakeven, below today's intraday low 981 with buffer), target 1100 (analyst consensus 1143, conservative at 1100). Locking in partial risk reduction."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "new_target": 135.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge position. Gold pulled back on ceasefire hopes but structural bid intact. SL 119 (~5% below entry), target 135 (~8% upside). Keeping as portfolio hedge given VIX at 18.6."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1620.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Up 3.2%, strong breakout to 52w high on 2.3x volume. Power theme intact. Trail SL to 1620 (below today's low 1645 with buffer, locking in near-breakeven). Target 1820 (~10% upside toward analyst consensus 2000+). R:R favorable."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1340.00,
      "new_target": 1550.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Best Q4 in 9 years, +27% PAT, double-digit volume growth. Stock at 52w high Rs 1407. SL 1340 (~5% below entry, below breakout level), target 1550 (~10% upside). High-quality FMCG leader."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 998.00,
      "new_target": 1130.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "At 52w high Rs 1054. Q4 earnings April 25 (2 days away) — binary event risk. Tight SL at 998 (~5% below entry, just below today's low) to limit downside if results disappoint. Target 1130 (~8% upside). Considering BOOK_PARTIAL pre-earnings."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 645.00,
      "new_target": 745.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results April 29. Pharma sector tailwind, tariff exemption for generics. SL 645 (~5.3% below entry, below SMA20), target 745 (~9.4% upside). FDA 483 observations are procedural risk but bullish setup overall."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2255.00,
      "new_target": 2520.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Defensive FMCG. Q4 earnings April 28 — binary event. Stock +5.9% today on sector rotation. SL 2255 (~5% below entry), target 2520 (~6.2%). Nestle raised bar but rural recovery supportive. R:R moderate."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 385.00,
      "new_target": 435.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Strong broker consensus as top summer utility pick. Multiple capacity CODs this month. Q4 results May 15. SL 385 (~4.8% below entry, near SMA20 support), target 435 (~7.5% upside, upper analyst target range). Defensive regulated earnings."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 202.00,
      "new_target": 240.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Q4 earnings April 29 (6 days). At 52w high. Power theme strong. SL 202 (~5.6% below entry, below today's low 212.53 with buffer), target 240 (~12% upside). Shooting star on 4/20 is caution flag but trend intact. Cluster risk note: already holding TORNTPOWER + NTPC + ADANIPOWER = 3 power names."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 74.50,
      "reasoning": "Thesis intact post Q4 beat. SL set at 74.50."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 955.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL to near-breakeven after +11% gap day. Record earnings support continued upside."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Hedge position, setting SL at 119."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1620.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL to lock in near-breakeven. 52w high breakout on strong volume."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1340.00,
      "reasoning": "Best Q4 in 9 years, hold with tighter SL."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 998.00,
      "reasoning": "Hold into Q4 earnings April 25 with tight SL to limit event risk."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 645.00,
      "reasoning": "Hold into Q4 earnings April 29. Pharma sector tailwind."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2255.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hold into Q4 earnings April 28."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 385.00,
      "reasoning": "Top broker pick, strong capacity additions, hold into Q4 May 15."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 202.00,
      "reasoning": "Hold into Q4 earnings April 29 with SL below today's low."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BHEL, TRITURBINE, ELECON: Capital goods/power equipment breakouts — all extended short-term after 15-34% 2-week rallies. Wait for consolidation before entry. DATAPATTNS, DEEPAKNTR: One-day gap moves, don't chase. ADANIENSOL: Second Adani power-cluster name — skip, cluster exposure already high. CIPLA, DRREDDY: Pharma defensive — DRREDDY preferred but CIPLA fundamental weakness evident. PIRAMALFIN: NBFC catalyst — revisit if it consolidates with RSI setup. IEX/CESC: Interesting power-ancillary volume signals but our power cluster is already heavy.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Portfolio is 79% deployed — effectively at the 80% cap. CRITICAL FIX this tick: all 10 positions had zero stop-losses, which is a hard-constraint violation. Setting SLs on every position now. Cluster concentration observed: POWER = TORNTPOWER + NTPC + ADANIPOWER (~INR 123k, ~12% of capital — under 20% cluster threshold, acceptable but no further adds). FINANCIALS = PNBHOUSING + AUBANK + MAHABANK (~INR 362k, ~36% — hot spot, monitor carefully, NO more financials adds). FMCG = NESTLEIND + HINDUNILVR (~INR 167k, ~17%). Next 5 days are binary event-heavy (AUBANK 4/25, HINDUNILVR 4/28, GRANULES/ADANIPOWER 4/29, NESTLE already reported). Tight SLs are the correct posture. No new entries today — remaining cash INR 214k is the required buffer, not deployable. If any position hits SL and frees capital, reassess then."
}
